productDisplayName: Peter England Men Leather Black Wallet
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this wallet from peter england is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Peter England have perfected this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet. Dimensions : 10 cm x 15 cm Made of black leather One main compartment One insert pocket One zippered pocket Multi card slots inside One id card holder with mesh One insert pocket on the top Care Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
